name: Lime Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Cored and cut in half firm Ripe bosc/anjou pears
2 Cored and cut into 1/2-inch Pieces celery stalks
2 Tart green apples, cut Lengthwise then into 1/2-inch Pieces
2 Peeled and cut into 1/4-inch Dice carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix water and lemon juice in a large bowl.
2. Toss in pears and apples; let rest for 10 minutes to prevent discoloration.
3. Drain fruits, discarding liquid, and pat dry. Return them to the bowl.
4. Add celery, carrots, walnuts, and raisins.
5. Toss with lime mayonnaise.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
7. Before serving, mix well and sprinkle top with mint and sunflower seeds.
